name: certifique-me
description: Sistema de gestão e emissão de certificados digitais para eventos.
author: Esdras L. Bispo Jr. <esdraspiano@gmail.com>

scripts.test:docker: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml up -d && sleep 5 && npm test
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run format && npm run test:ci
scripts.check:docker: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec -T app_test sh -c 'npm run lint && npm run format && npm test'
scripts.check:docker:coverage: docker-compose -f docker-compose.test.yml exec -T app_test sh -c 'npm run lint && npm run format && npm run test:coverage'
